normalization_point: KB/Shinhan/Hana/Woori-style financial holdings can be Green-capable only when return execution and capital quality confirm the rerating.
KB/Shinhan-style Stage 3 candidate path focuses on ROE/PBR band change and repeat return, not low PBR alone.
PF and credit-cost issues are hard RedTeam gates across bank and securities candidates.
JB/BNK/DGB-style regional banks can reach Stage 2/3 but liquidity and regional credit risk cap the score.
DB Insurance/Samsung Fire-style candidates need K-ICS, CSM, loss ratio, and return execution before Stage 3.
Insurance headlines are capped before K-ICS, CSM quality, and loss-ratio detail.
Brokerage can reach Stage 2 on market beta, but Stage 3 is capped unless IB, PF, and ROE durability confirm.
Securities PF/IB loss is a hard cap for brokerage rerating.
KakaoBank needs record profit, non-interest income, credit quality, and valuation discipline; users alone are Stage 1.
Naver-Dunamu-style equity option can be Stage 2, but security and approval block Stage 3.
Toss direct exposure can be Stage 2; listed related stocks are capped before direct ownership and revenue model proof.
KRW stablecoin is Stage 1/2 optionality until approval, volume, reserve, redemption, and issuer economics are visible.
Seoul Guarantee IPO optionality is capped by ransomware and financial-service operational trust risk.
OpenDART list or policy headlines cannot support financial Green without detailed capital, return, credit, and security evidence.
Financial value-up basket rally is useful for 4B cooling, not automatic Green.
